instruction: 把产品销售情况记录下来

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '产品名'
ws['B1'] = '单价(元)'
ws['C1'] = '销量(件)'
ws['D1'] = '退货率(%)'
ws['A2'] = '超薄笔记本'
ws['B2'] = 4999
ws['C2'] = 320
ws['D2'] = 1.2
ws['A3'] = '无线鼠标'
ws['B3'] = 129
ws['C3'] = 1850
ws['D3'] = 0.8
ws['A4'] = '机械键盘'
ws['B4'] = 399
ws['C4'] = 680
ws['D4'] = 2.1
ws['A5'] = '显示器'
ws['B5'] = 1299
ws['C5'] = 410
ws['D5'] = 1.5
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/product_sales.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 把产品销售情况记录下来
从/home/user/Desktop/product_sales.xlsx中找到退货率最低的产品，在/home/user/Desktop/product_summary.txt末尾追加：'退货率最低产品：无线鼠标（0.8%）'，保存

include: 退货率最低产品：无线鼠标（0.8%）
